sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الأَرُزُّ وَاللَّحْمُ مِنَ الأَطْبَاقِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ فِي المَائِدَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Riža i meso smatraju se glavnim jelima na arapskoj trpezi.
sentences.translationEn: Rice and meat are considered main dishes on the Arab table.

sentences.arabic: فِي المُنَاسَبَاتِ الكَبِيرَةِ، يَجْتَمِعُ الأَهْلُ لِتَنَاوُلِ وَجْبَةِ 'المَنْدِي' أَوْ 'الكَبْسَةِ'.
sentences.translation: U velikim prilikama, porodica se okuplja kako bi jela 'mandi' ili 'kabsu'.
sentences.translationEn: On big occasions, family members gather to eat 'mandi' or 'kabsa.'

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ بَهَارَاتٌ مُتَنَوِّعَةٌ تُعْطِي الطَّعَامَ نَكْهَةً مُمَيَّزَةً.
sentences.translation: Koriste se razni začini koji hrani daju poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Various spices are used to give the food a unique flavor.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ مَعًا مِنْ صَحْنٍ وَاحِدٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu zajedno iz jedne velike posude.
sentences.translationEn: People eat together from one large plate.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ العَادَةُ تُعَزِّزُ الرَّوَابِطَ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِ العَائِلَةِ وَالأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj jača veze između članova porodice i prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: This custom strengthens the bonds between family members and friends.
